title: crotalaria polhillii
intro: Crotalaria polhillii, also known as the Polhill's rattlebox, is a plant species that belongs to the legume family (Fabaceae). The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal activities. The health benefits of Crotalaria polhillii include its potential to treat various ailments such as fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, as well as its ability to support the immune system. In traditional medicine, the plant is often prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or decoction, and is also used in the form of extracts and tinctures to harness its medicinal properties.
